title: Robot Warden
description: Turns the Warden into a Scary Robot that is also kinda Funny?
body:
**Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features are REQUIRED! Optifine also works.**
This Resourcepack turns Wardens into Robots with a 3D Model and Custom Sounds
![Warden firing laser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3489ea746dad62c9847679de59c61d16cfb9becf_0.webp)
**Check the gallery for more pictures.**
